footer.tagline: Marcel Kück · Freelance AI Engineer · Munich, Germany · © 2026

home.metaDescription: AI agents, workflow automation, and custom integrations for mid-market businesses across Germany and internationally. Built for production.

hero.label: AI ENGINEER · RESEARCHER · ENTREPRENEUR
hero.body: I work with mid market businesses across Germany and internationally to build production grade AI agents, workflow automation, and custom integrations. Background: Computer Science at TU Munich, Software Engineering at Siemens, two founded SaaS companies, and active research at Devanthro and the University of Oxford.
hero.imageAlt: Marcel Kück, AI engineer based in Munich

featured.label: FEATURED PROJECT
featured.body: For Motion Sports, a German online retailer, I'm building an integrated AI assistant that handles consultation, order support, returns, and after-sales, all inside their existing online shop. The agent connects to inventory, order data, and customer history, and escalates to humans when it should. Goal: turn customer service from a cost center into a revenue driver.

about.label: ABOUT MARCEL
about.p1: I studied computer science at TU Munich and worked two years in parallel as a backend engineer at Siemens. After graduating, I spent two years at Devanthro on embodied AI and robotics control, first as research engineer, then as founders associate. I then co-founded two SaaS companies: ShareYourSpace (a coworking marketplace) and Rechnungs-API (an invoice automation API).
about.p2: Today I work as a freelance AI engineer. In parallel, I continue research at Devanthro on the OpenArm platform and at the University of Oxford with Prof. Pierre Alexis Mouthuy on sensor-integrated bioreactors for artificial muscles.
about.p3: Outside of work, I build things for fun: hardware like a self-built smart coffee roaster (which turned into a hobby roasting brand, Marie Lou Coffee), robotic arms, 3D-printed contraptions, and on the software side smart home solutions and my own machine learning and robotics framework written in Rust.

finalCta.body: Reach out directly and let's talk through what you want to build.

projects.metaDescription: A selection of AI, automation, robotics, and hardware projects: client work, founded SaaS products, research, and side projects.
projects.label: PROGRAMMING PROJECTS
projects.intro: A selection of projects I've built across AI, automation, robotics, and hardware. A mix of client work, founded products, research, and side projects. Open source where possible.
projects.freelanceLink: Looking for freelance work? Work with me →

motionSports.title: Motion Sports AI Agent
motionSports.description: Integrated AI assistant for a German online retailer, handling consultation, orders, returns, and after-sales inside their shop. Connected to inventory, order data, and customer history.

rechnungsApi.title: Rechnungs-API
rechnungsApi.description: A SaaS API for automating invoice generation, validation, and ZUGFeRD/XRechnung compliance. Built and operated as a founder.

shareYourSpace.title: ShareYourSpace
shareYourSpace.description: Marketplace platform connecting companies with flexible coworking and meeting spaces. Co-founded and led product engineering.

openArm.title: OpenArm Platform
openArm.description: Open robotics platform for embodied AI research. Currently working on motion control and integration with foundation models at Devanthro.

coffeeRoaster.title: Smart Coffee Roaster
coffeeRoaster.description: IoT-controlled coffee roaster with profile recording and replay. Closed-loop temperature control via Raspberry Pi, custom firmware, and a small web UI for managing roasts. Also the origin of Marie Lou Coffee (marieloucoffee.com).

leRobot.title: LE Robot + 3D Printing Rig
leRobot.description: Hardware sandbox combining a low-cost robotic arm with a custom 3D printing setup. Used for experimenting with imitation learning, RL, and hardware integration.

svEsting.title: SV Esting — Turnen App
svEsting.description: Full-stack web app for the gymnastics department of SV Esting. Handles group organisation, training management, and member communication for ~200 active users.

work.metaDescription: Freelance AI and automation engagements: audits, AI agent implementation, workflow automation, custom AI integrations. Engineered for your business.

hero.label: WORK WITH MARCEL
hero.body: I work with mid-market businesses, agencies, and ambitious teams who want to deploy AI and automation that actually moves the needle. Not slide decks. Engagements run from short audits to multi-month builds.

audit.title: AI Automation Audit
audit.body: A focused 1–2 day deep dive that delivers a written roadmap of automation opportunities, prioritized by ROI.

agent.title: AI Agent Implementation
agent.body: Production-grade AI agents for customer support, sales qualification, internal copilots, or operations.

workflow.title: Workflow Automation
workflow.body: End-to-end process automation using Make, Zapier, n8n, and custom code. Connected and running.

integration.title: Custom AI Integration
integration.body: Bespoke integrations between your business systems and AI models: RAG, internal search, custom analytics.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.body: 30 minutes, free. We talk through what you're trying to achieve.

steps.title: Audit
steps.body: 1–2 day paid deep dive. You get a written roadmap.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Iterative implementation with weekly demos. You see progress every week.

steps.title: Handover
steps.body: Documented, monitored, owned by your team. Optional retainer for ongoing support.
